title: SDD example ruleset with the bracket
description:
Extend the SDD example ruleset to declare the epic breakable, add the bracket types, wire both gates, and use lifecycle-scoped coverage.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] The SDD example declares its breakable container and bracket types and wires plan-review and coverage-preview.
- [ ] An uncovered hard criterion is blocked at the breakdown gate in the example tests.
- [ ] The example uses child-type-exclude to drop the bracket types from coverage, and uses lifecycle-scoped coverage wording.
- [ ] No methodology-specific strings are added to engine Rust.
